Program 1

package day3;

public class Program_FactorialOf6 {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//Java program to calculate the factorial of 6
		
		int num = 6;
		int factorial = 1;
		
		for (int i=1;i<=num;i++)
		{
			factorial = factorial * i;
		}
			
			System.out.println("Factorial of 6 =" +factorial);
			

	}

}


Program 2

package day3;

public class Program_FactorOfNumber24 {

	public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//Factors of the number 24 
		
		int num = 24;
        
        System.out.println("Factors of " + num + " are:");
               
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= num; i++) 
        {
           
            if (num % i == 0) 
            {
                System.out.println(i+" ");
            }
        }

	}

}


Program 3

package day3;

public class Program_NoOfDigits {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//Java program to count the number of digits in the number 987654 using a loop.
		
		long num = 987654L;
		int count = 0;
		
		for (count = 0; num > 0; num = num/10) 
		{
			count = count + 1;
		}
		
		System.out.println(" Number of digits = "+count);

	}

}

Program 4

package day3;

public class Program_SumOfDigits {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		//Java program to find the sum of digits of the number 4567
		//Extract the last digit using the modulo % 10 and reduce the number using integer division / 10)
		
		int num = 4567; 
		int Reminder = 0;
		int total = 0;
		
		for (
				total = 0; num > 0; num = num/10)
		{
			Reminder = num % 10;
			total = total + Reminder;
		}
		
		System.out.println(" Sum of Digit = "+total);

	}

}
